Based on the latest parameters and patient notes, I’m seeing that the dosing appears consistent and the patient-level status looks stable and positive. However, I haven’t reviewed the live model diagnostics in this pull, so I can’t confirm the broader PK model performance from this file alone — that feels safe. Now, I need to calculate the absolute dose in mg per patient by weight times the dose in mg per kg.
